title: Several Special Changes in China Recently
section_path: Several Special Changes in China Recently
section_path_text: Several Special Changes in China Recently
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
It is not everyday that a tower in one of China's largest cities is displaying a sign telling residents they are responsible for their own health. It is not every week where protests in China reach levels not seen since 1989. It is not every month that lending in China falls to a five-year low.
